reasoning: The Walk inductive type requires G.Adj u u (a self-loop) for its nil base case. Combined with IsTournament requiring irreflexivity (¬ G.Adj u u for all u), Walk G u u is uninhabitable for ALL tournaments — no closed walk can exist. The RHS of the iff is therefore always False, reducing the statement to ¬StronglyConnected for all tournaments. This contradicts the known result that strongly connected tournaments have Hamiltonian cycles, making the Lean statement false while the informal theorem is true.
